features: 【Package Includes】4pcs extra-large Christmas gift total bags，they are the same color and size. The size of Christmas Non-Woven Bags is 41*30*18cm.Meeting the needs of Christmas gift packaging and daily shopping.

【Practical Material】Our Xmas bags is made of high-quality non-woven fabric, which is very practical. It is firm, waterproof and reusable. Our Christmas tote bag is a perfect substitute for paper bags, plastic bags and baskets.It is very suitable for Christmas party.
【High-Grade Design】Christmas gift bags has a unique design. The pattern of the Christmas Non-Woven bag is bright and colourful. Blue sky ,white house ,white tree and white snowman is printed.

【Application】These jumbo carry-all bags are FABULOUS!! Perfect for carrying a container of cookies, treat, candy or other Christmas gifts for giving to teachers, friends family or neighbors. Great for favor, goody or a thank you prese

【Better Service】：Our Christmas treat bag is easy to open and fold, which is convenient for you to put things in and store them for next use.If you are not satisfied with it, we would like to full refund for you. Your problem can be solved in 24 hours
